headline: A Look At FirstEnergy (FE) Valuation As Shares Trade Near Fair Value Estimates
summary: Why FirstEnergy (FE) is on investors’ radar today Without a clear single news headline driving attention, interest in FirstEnergy (FE) today centers on how its recent share performance and financial profile might fit into a utility-focused portfolio. See our latest analysis for FirstEnergy. At a share price of US$51.43, FirstEnergy has seen a 15.18% 90 day share price return and a 31.83% 1 year total shareholder return, which points to strengthening momentum rather than short term noise.
